project.name: The Witness
project.local_vantage: subtle; do not overfocus on location
project.editorial_mandate: Maintain non-Western vantage point. Prevent US-centric tech feed bias. Weight regional and Global South voices equally with Western sources.

sources.title: The growth myth in financial inclusion?
sources.author: none@none.com (BR Research)
sources.summary: Pakistan’s financial-inclusion debate rests on a proposition invoked far more often than it is tested: expand formal credit to farmers and microenterprises, and growth will follow. It is intuitively attractive, politically safe, and developmentally convenient. It also carries the protection of moral framing; to question it is to risk sounding indifferent…
